{{Quote|Let's just enjoy the sun while it lasts…|Anakin Skywalker|<ref name="Republic 57">[[Republic 57|''Republic'' 57]]</ref>}}
'''Jabiim''' was the primary [[Star/Legends|star]] of the [[Jabiim system/Legends|Jabiim system]].

{{Star-stub}}
